assertions.assertion: An authorization policy requiring the 'catalog.read' scope is defined using RequireClaim
assertions.rationale: The code defines options.AddPolicy("catalog.read", policy => policy.RequireClaim("scope", "catalog.read")).

assertions.assertion: An authorization policy requiring the 'catalog.write' scope is defined using RequireClaim
assertions.rationale: The code defines options.AddPolicy("catalog.write", policy => policy.RequireClaim("scope", "catalog.write")).

assertions.assertion: The GET /products endpoint uses .RequireAuthorization() referencing the read policy
The POST /products endpoint uses .RequireAuthorization() referencing the write policy
builder.Services.AddAuthorization is called to register the policies
assertions.rationale: The code calls builder.Services.AddAuthorization(options => { ... }) to register policies.
